alpha.desc: Large single-story commercial structure, Primary covered entrance with walkway access, Multiple front-facing windows, Extensive paved parking and vehicle access, Mature trees with moderate landscaping buffer

bravo.desc: Side utility and service access area, Narrow landscaped setback with mature trees, Limited window openings along fa?ade, Roof-mounted HVAC systems visible, Clear responder access along building edge

charlie.desc: Rear service and outdoor activity area, Fenced sections with open lawn space, Multiple rear access doors and windows, Tree canopy coverage along perimeter, Concrete walkways and hardscape visible

delta.desc: Secondary side access with paved drive lane, Mature trees adjacent to structure, Limited fa?ade openings, Roofline and mechanical units visible overhead, Clear emergency vehicle circulation path

nadir.desc: Large commercial nursery campus with multiple parking areas, Dense mature tree coverage around perimeter, Clearly defined building footprint and access drives, Centralized structure with surrounding pedestrian pathways, Combination of open lawn, hardscape, and shaded areas
